description: Must_push action with annotated outcome and two feedback cycles — strong learning candidate.

expected.reason: Outcome is annotated with two completed feedback cycles. High-quality candidate for correlation scoring.

description: Worker_instruction action with annotated outcome and one feedback cycle — learning candidate for instruction tracking.

expected.reason: Worker instruction with one annotated feedback cycle. Eligible as a correlation training case.

description: Review_required action with no feedback cycle yet — watch_only until at least one cycle is complete.

expected.reason: Outcome not yet annotated and no feedback cycles complete. Correct posture is monitoring.

description: Learning_candidate action with annotated outcome and three feedback cycles — high-confidence learning candidate.

expected.reason: Three annotated feedback cycles on a learning candidate action. Well-formed data point for outcome correlation study.

description: Must_push action with one feedback cycle but outcome not annotated — watch_only pending annotation.

expected.reason: One feedback cycle completed but outcome is not yet annotated. Monitor until annotation is added.

description: NEGATIVE: Must_push action with no outcome annotation and no feedback — insufficient data, review required.

expected.reason: Must_push action has no outcome annotation and zero feedback cycles. Cannot enter correlation path without human review.

description: NEGATIVE: Review_required action with abnormally high feedback cycle count suggesting runaway loop — rejected.

expected.reason: 50 feedback cycles without outcome annotation indicates a loop or data integrity issue. Rejected as unsafe training data.

description: NEGATIVE: Learning_candidate action with no evidence refs and no annotation — rejected as untracked case.

expected.reason: No evidence refs and no annotation. Untracked learning candidate cannot enter the outcome correlation study.
